description: Test cases for semantic-release skill - verifying ticket_id-only format in commits, footers, and version bumping

evals.name: commit_message_uses_ticket_id_only
evals.prompt: Create a conventional commit: 'feat(api): add query endpoint' addressing issue #55

assertions.name: no_underscore_in_scope
assertions.check: Message does not contain pattern like '#3_55' or '(api, #3_55)'

assertions.name: ticket_id_in_footer
assertions.description: Ticket ID appears in footer, not elsewhere

evals.name: version_bump_from_branch_ticket
evals.prompt: On branch feat/106-query-athlete, determine version bump type from the branch and issue
evals.expected_output: Type 'feat' inferred, MINOR version bump determined

assertions.name: type_from_branch_prefix
assertions.description: Commit type correctly extracted from branch prefix
assertions.check: Output indicates 'feat' type from feat/106-... branch

assertions.name: ticket_id_extracted_no_board
assertions.description: Ticket ID extracted without board_id logic
assertions.check: Branch parsing extracts 106, not attempting to parse board_id

evals.name: reject_old_board_id_format
evals.prompt: Attempt to create commit with reference 'Closes torqlab/torq#3_55'
evals.expected_output: Validation error: footer format should be 'Closes #ticket_id' only

assertions.name: rejects_repo_prefix
assertions.description: Rejects footer with repo prefix like 'torqlab/torq#'
assertions.check: Output contains validation error about format

assertions.name: rejects_underscore_separator
assertions.description: Rejects underscore separator in issue reference

assertions.name: error_message_helpful
assertions.description: Error explains correct format to user
assertions.check: Error contains example of correct format

evals.name: changelog_generation_uses_hash_only
evals.prompt: Generate changelog entry for fix/42-race-condition addressing issue #42
evals.expected_output: Changelog entry with link format: closes #42 (no board_id, no repo prefix)

assertions.name: changelog_issue_link_format
assertions.description: Changelog uses #ticket_id format for issue links

assertions.name: no_board_id_in_changelog
assertions.check: Changelog does not contain '_' separator pattern

assertions.name: no_repo_prefix_in_changelog
assertions.description: No repo prefix like 'torqlab/torq#' in changelog

evals.name: current_repo_validation_only
evals.prompt: Try to reference issue from different repo: 'Closes torqlab/other-repo#55'
evals.expected_output: Error: issues must be from current repository only

assertions.name: rejects_cross_repo
assertions.check: Output contains error about current repo only

assertions.name: no_org_search
assertions.description: No attempt to search across organization
assertions.check: Output does not show org-wide search commands

assertions.name: error_suggests_local_issue
assertions.description: Error guides user to use current repo issue
